Per capita offending rates per 1,000:  

Blacks against Whites: ~11.6  
Whites against Blacks: ~0.38  
Ratio: ~31:1  

A white person is 31 times more likely to be a victim of black crime than the reverse. This is a stark, undeniable disparity.

Happy Black History month 💔💔

quotedTweet.content:
More than 30% of US medical residents are trained in other countries. 10,000 of the 43,000 annual medical residency slots are filled by H-1B visa holders. 

Texas just passed a law to streamline the process for foreign doctors to obtain a license.

Meanwhile, foreign grads take up more and more residency spots.
